english translation text:
My home is where The Message was sent
Day in and out the angels descend
Now you ask me what did I see?
I saw nothing but beauty

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
I saw Hussain quenching his foes
Mashallah
Mashallah
Hussain holding a dessert rose
Mashallah
I witnessed valour
english translation text: I saw as they replied arrows

urdu transliteration text:
@HujjatELC
I am Zainab the Hashimite
Now shackled and taken in chains
Looking at my beloved Hussain
english translation text: Moon to my left the sun was to my right

The mountain that didn't shake
I saw the river carry the lake
I saw what no other eye can take
I saw my brother

The river came to you on its knees
Begging you drink crashing at your feet
You denied your self even a taste
For the moon never lifts up the waves

How you gave your eye
From the tents you shied
